channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters dumped outside no 39 Jenner Road, 17th April
item.description:
Nitrous oxide containers have been dumped on the road outside no 39 Jenner Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Copycat resident blocking parking space with 2 wheelie bins, 17th April
item.description:
Another resident is also using wheelie bins to block parking outside their property this has been ongoing for months. This started in response to the resident with the multi vehicles using their bins to block parking spaces, it is spreading. Other residents are copying this selfish behaviour and it is becoming a street wide problem on Birdbrook Road. The same dangers apply, dangerous road obstruction, traffic bottlenecks at rush hour, and serious arguments and near fights between residents and other drivers. The bins block the road and pavement forcing children, elderly people, and parents with pushchairs into the road to get past putting them at serious risk from moving traffic. This is now a plague of antisocial behaviour causing misery and danger across the entire street for all residents and pedestrians. If left unchecked this will escalate further. The council must act on all offending properties before this becomes uncontrollable and someone is seriously injured.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birdbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path still blocked on parkland walk, 17th April
item.description:
Was meant to be reopened late March. No communication as to why it's still shut or when it'll open.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkland Walk, Crouch End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish blocking footpath, 17th April
item.description:
Rubbish has been collecting over several weeks. Located on the right hand side of Southwood Road as you approach the park, next to the last mature tree before the entrance to Woolf Close. In addition, directly opposite on the other side of the road is a large sheet of playwood. Based upon its shape it appears to be part of the interior paneling of a van.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolf Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 17th April
item.description:
House furniture has been fly tipped on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Club Gardens Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on metal door, 17th April
item.description:
There is graffiti on a metal door, located next to garage 38 in Anna Close, E8 and opposite 15 Anna Close on the Regent Estate in Hackney. This is a Hackney Council Estate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broke Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed bump maintenance, 17th April
item.description:
The speed bumps need some attention. They are very high in some places due to the uneveness of the surface, this is causing damage to both the path and to vehicles and is also a noise issue for nearby residents. IN ADDITION THE PEDESTRIAN CROSSING IN FROM MOUNTVIEW ROAD IS VERY WORN and not visible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mountview Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another flytip, 17th April
item.description:
Flytip on the corner of Laurel Grove. Note that there is a delivery address for someone on the red Gousto box. Photo not included as this is PII.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurel Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A road sign pole has been bent over parallel to the ground., 17th April
item.description:
A metal road sign must have been hit by a vehicle. It is completely bent over parallel to the pavement. This is serious trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cattistock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is flytipping rubbish in the back garden, 17th April
item.description:
Someone is fly-tipping rubbish in the back garden which leads to the private residency carpark. They have been adding to the pile each time by lifting up the back fence. There has been a van that comes and dumps the rubbish there. The rubbish is constantly been added and then someone in the middle block keeps starting fires late at night. This has been an ongoing issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 58 Godstow Road: wooden boards in raisedbed., 17th April
item.description:
Fly-tipping is at beginning of raisedbed opposite 58 Godstow Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needle outside 132 Babik Court E82FG, 17th April
item.description:
Please see pictures, needle outside 132 Babik Court E82FG. Please remove as soon as possible, lots of children walk to school via this street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Approximately 18 Eynsham Drive: large paint canister send other rubbish., 17th April
item.description:
Rubbish, including shoe, is strewn all over this pathway down to 46 Godstow Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 broken abandoned bikes, 17th April
item.description:
These bikes have been here in a sorry state for at least 2 years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hilsea Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 35 Godstow Road: vacuum cleaners., 17th April
item.description:
Vacuum cleaners have been dumped in the undergrowth at the side of 35 Godstow Road. They are partially obscured by the weeds.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light facing the wrong way, 17th April
item.description:
The traffic light outside the McDonald's is facing the wrong way. The traffic light for Victoria Road eastbound on the McDonald's side is turned and facing the southbound traffic of the Kilburn High Road traffic. Therefore, the traffic for the Kilburn High Road Southbound can see the traffic light for the Victoria Road eastbound, mistaken the green light for it, lead to accidentally running a red light by mistake.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kilburn High Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped on the side of the pavement, 17th April
item.description:
Enterprise rent-a-van seen dumping a single bedframe, a mattress and some cupboards opposite 36-38 Ankerdine Crescent. Still has not returned to collect them and it has now been more than 48h so definitely flytipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of Flytipping by entrance to self storage unit, 17th April
item.description:
Hello, please could a crew be sent to remove the flytipping along this road? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 135 Godstow Road: vacuum cleaners., 17th April
item.description:
Vacuum cleaners have been dumped at side of 35 Godstow Road in the overgrown shrubbery’. They are partially obscured by weeds, etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon, 17th April
item.description:
Dead pigeon
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
